name: Mount Everest
description: Highest peak on Earth above sea level, located on the Nepal-China border.

name: K2
description: Second highest peak on Earth, located on the Pakistan-China border. Known as the Savage Mountain.

name: Kangchenjunga
description: Third highest mountain on Earth, located on the Nepal-India border.

name: Lhotse
description: Fourth highest mountain on Earth, connected to Everest via the South Col.

name: Makalu
description: Fifth highest mountain on Earth, known for its distinct four-sided pyramidal shape.

name: Cho Oyu
first_ascent_by: Herbert Tichy, Sepp Jöchler, Pasang Dawa Lama
description: Sixth highest mountain on Earth, located on the Nepal-China border.

name: Dhaulagiri I
first_ascent_by: Kurt Diemberger, Peter Diener, Ernst Forrer, Albin Schelbert, Nawang Dorje, Nima Dorje
description: Seventh highest mountain on Earth, entirely within Nepal.

name: Manaslu
description: Eighth highest mountain on Earth, entirely within Nepal. Name means 'Mountain of the Spirit'.

name: Nanga Parbat
description: Ninth highest mountain on Earth, located in Pakistan. Known as Killer Mountain.

name: Annapurna I
description: Tenth highest mountain on Earth and the first eight-thousander to be climbed.

name: Gasherbrum I
description: Eleventh highest mountain on Earth, also known as Hidden Peak, on the Pakistan-China border.

name: Broad Peak
first_ascent_by: Fritz Wintersteller, Marcus Schmuck, Kurt Diemberger, Hermann Buhl
description: Twelfth highest mountain on Earth, located on the Pakistan-China border.

name: Gasherbrum II
first_ascent_by: Fritz Moravec, Josef Larch, Hans Willenpart
description: Thirteenth highest mountain on Earth, on the Pakistan-China border.

name: Shishapangma
description: Fourteenth highest mountain on Earth and the only eight-thousander entirely within China.

name: Gyachung Kang
first_ascent_by: Yutaka Ageta, Katsutoshi Hirabayashi, Pasang Phutar
description: Highest peak between Cho Oyu and Everest, on the Nepal-China border.

name: Distaghil Sar
description: Highest peak of the Hispar Muztagh sub-range in the Karakoram, Pakistan.

name: Ngadi Chuli
description: Also known as Peak 29 or Dakura, located in Nepal's Mansiri Himal.

name: Nuptse
description: Part of the Everest massif, directly west of Lhotse in Nepal.

name: Khunyang Chhish
first_ascent_by: Andrzej Zawada, Jan Stryczynski, Ryszard Szafirski, Tadeusz Piotrowski
description: Located in the Hispar Muztagh sub-range of the Karakoram in Pakistan.

name: Masherbrum
description: Also known as K1, located in the Masherbrum Mountains of the Karakoram, Pakistan.

name: Nanda Devi
description: Highest peak entirely within India and the second highest in India overall.

name: Chomo Lonzo
first_ascent_by: Jean Franco, Lionel Terray, Guido Magnone
description: Located near Makalu on the Nepal-China border.

name: Batura Sar
first_ascent_by: Karl Gablentz, Herbert Oberhofer, Rainer Göschl, Hartmut Haker, Peter von Zänker
description: Located in the Batura Muztagh sub-range of the Karakoram in Pakistan.

name: Rakaposhi
description: Dominant peak of the Rakaposhi-Haramosh Mountains in Pakistan's Karakoram.

name: Namcha Barwa
description: Eastern anchor of the Himalayas in Tibet, China, near the great Tsangpo Gorge.

name: Kanjut Sar
description: Located in the Hispar Muztagh sub-range of the Karakoram in Pakistan.

name: Kamet
first_ascent_by: Frank Smythe, Eric Shipton, R.L. Holdsworth, Lewa Sherpa
description: Second highest peak in India, located in Uttarakhand in the Garhwal Himalayas.

name: Dhaulagiri II
description: Second highest peak of the Dhaulagiri massif in Nepal.

name: Saltoro Kangri
description: Highest peak of the Saltoro Mountains sub-range of the Karakoram on the Pakistan-India ceasefire line.

name: Jannu
description: Also known as Kumbhakarna, a dramatic peak in the Kangchenjunga Himal, Nepal.

name: Tirich Mir
first_ascent_by: Arne Næss, Peter Kvernberg, Henry Berg, Tony Streather
description: Highest peak of the Hindu Kush range, located in Chitral, Pakistan.

name: Molamenqing
description: Also known as Molamenging or Labuche Kang, located on the Tibet-Nepal border.

name: Gurla Mandhata
description: Highest peak of the Nalakankar Himal in western Tibet, China.

name: Ulugh Muztagh
description: Highest peak of the Kunlun Mountains in western China.

name: Kongur Tagh
first_ascent_by: Chris Bonington, Al Rouse, Peter Boardman, Joe Tasker
description: Highest peak in the Pamir-Kunlun area of Xinjiang, China.

name: Skyang Kangri
description: Located near K2 in the Karakoram range on the Pakistan-China border.

name: Changtse
description: North peak of the Everest massif, entirely in Tibet, China.

name: Muztagh Ata
description: Second highest peak of the Pamir plateau in Xinjiang, China.

name: Ismoil Somoni Peak
description: Highest peak in Tajikistan and the former Soviet Union, formerly known as Communism Peak.

name: Jengish Chokusu
description: Highest peak of the Tian Shan mountains on the Kyrgyzstan-China border, also known as Pobeda Peak.

name: Lenin Peak
first_ascent_by: Karl Wien, Eugen Allwein, Erwin Schneider
description: One of the most accessible seven-thousanders, on the Kyrgyzstan-Tajikistan border.

name: Aconcagua
description: Highest peak in the Western Hemisphere and Southern Hemisphere, located in Argentina.

name: Ojos del Salado
description: Second highest peak in the Western Hemisphere and highest active volcano on Earth, on Chile-Argentina border.

name: Monte Pissis
description: Third highest peak in the Western Hemisphere, located in Argentina.

name: Huascarán
description: Highest peak in Peru and in the tropics, part of the Cordillera Blanca.

name: Llullaillaco
description: Second highest active volcano on Earth, on the Chile-Argentina border.

name: Mercedario
description: Located in San Juan Province, Argentina, part of the high Andes near Aconcagua.

name: Huandoy
description: Prominent peak in Peru's Cordillera Blanca with four summits.

name: Yerupajá
description: Highest peak of the Cordillera Huayhuash in Peru, known for very steep faces.

name: Nevado Sajama
description: Highest peak in Bolivia and an extinct volcano in Sajama National Park.

name: Denali
first_ascent_by: Hudson Stuck, Harry Karstens, Walter Harper, Robert Tatum
description: Highest peak in North America, located in Alaska, USA. Formerly known as Mount McKinley.

name: Mount Logan
description: Highest peak in Canada and second highest in North America, in Yukon's Kluane National Park.
